section_title: When a promise is to be performed on a certain day, and the promisor
content:
48. When a promise is to be performed on a certain day, and the promisor
for
has not undertaken to perform it without application by the promisee, it is the
performance
on certain duty of the promisee to apply for performance at a proper place and within
day to be at
the usual hours of business.
proper time
and place Explanation – The question "what is a proper time and place" is, in each
particular case, a question of fact.
